steps.title: Notice the opposite decision
steps.content: Eiffel advised Bartholdi to make the statue's arm thick and straight above the head. Bartholdi chose the opposite approach: slim the arm and tilt it out.

steps.title: Signal a replacement
steps.content: Choice A signals addition, Choice C signals result, and Choice D signals example. The transition must show that Bartholdi chose a different approach from Eiffel's recommendation. The answer is B.
